backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining contact info storage and inquiry submission/retrieval endpoints with in-memory Map storage for inquiries and mutable contact information.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features (hero, about, services, contact, header, footer) with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing styling, components, hooks, and application structure for the Gowtham Groups website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space for corporate branding colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Gowtham Groups website.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering the complete single-page layout with Header, Hero, About, Services, Contact, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying company overview with mission, vision, and values in a three-column card layout with icons.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with form validation, backend-fetched contact info cards, and inquiry submission using React Query hooks with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with company info, quick navigation links, social media icons, copyright notice, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed header component with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menu, scroll detection for styling changes, and smooth scrolling to page sections (hero, about, services, contact).
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component with background image, gradient overlay, headline text, and two CTA buttons that scroll to contact and about sections.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying three service cards (Manufacturing, Logistics, Retail) with images, descriptions, and feature lists in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: React Query hook that fetches contact information from the backend actor using the getContactInfo method.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitInquiry.ts: React Query mutation hook that submits inquiry data (name, email, message) to the backend actor and invalidates the inquiries query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a warm corporate color palette (charcoal, terracotta, amber) for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using OKLCH), fonts (Inter, Playfair Display), shadows, animations (accordion, fade-in), and container settings.
project_state.json: Project configuration for Gowtham Groups corporate website inspired by danielmerchandising.co.in, defining 7 implemented features (hero, about, services, contact, navigation, footer, corporate design) and image requirements for logos, service icons, and backgrounds.
